label_verbatim: (name of corporation) [first signature block]
rationale: Right-side blank labeled '(name of corporation)' on the DATED row. Re-states the first corporation's name to scope the signature block.

label_verbatim: *By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) [first signature block, signer 1]
rationale: First-party signer 1 (combined name and capacity, Shape D).

label_verbatim: *By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) [first signature block, signer 2]
rationale: First-party signer 2. Two signer slots per party because some entity types under 13-B MRSA §904 require two signers (mirrors NP_MNPCA-10 merger pattern).

label_verbatim: DATED ___ [second signature block date]
rationale: Date the second participating corporation signed.

label_verbatim: *By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) [second signature block, signer 2]
